prestazioni: Engine: EJ207 (closed-deck, semi-forged internals, 92mm bore, 75mm stroke) with a Tomei 2.2L stroker kit (81mm crank, 99.5mm forged pistons, H-beam rods) and Tomei Type-S head gaskets for 11.5:1 compression. Paired with a Garrett GT3076R turbo (0.82 A/R, ball-bearing, 350-450hp capable) on a custom equal-length stainless steel header (SRS Racing) and a Tomei M82 titanium exhaust system with 80mm piping and a 100-cell GReddy Revolution RS II cat-back.

Drivetrain: STI 6-speed close-ratio transmission (RA gearset) with a PPG carbon synchro upgrade, reinforced with a Cusco Type-RS 1.5-way LSD and a Sachs Racing twin-disc clutch (440Nm torque capacity). Driveshaft and axles upgraded to STI Spec C components with a Cusco 2-way front LSD for balanced power distribution.

Suspension & Handling: Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (24-way adjustable damping, 30mm front/25mm rear ride height adjustment) with STI Group N top mounts and spherical bearing pillowballs. Front sway bar upgraded to a Cusco 24mm adjustable unit, rear sway bar to a 22mm Cusco adjustable. Braking system features AP Racing 6-pot front calipers (355mm discs) and 4-pot rear calipers (330mm discs) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and Motul RBF660 brake fluid. Wheels: Work Emotion CR Kiwami (18x9.5 +38 front, 18x10.5 +35 rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (255/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear).
estetica: Aero: STI S204 OEM carbon fiber front lip (reinforced with a Cusco underbrace), STI S204 carbon fiber rear diffuser, and a Voltex Type-3 rear wing (1,200mm width, 3D carbon fiber construction) with STI S204 endplates. Side skirts replaced with STI S204 carbon fiber units, and the hood upgraded to a Seibon dry carbon fiber STI S204 replica with integrated NACA ducts for brake cooling.

Exterior: Full STI S204 OEM body kit (fenders, bumper, mirrors) repainted in Subaru World Rally Blue (M3Y) with a 3M 1080 Gloss Black vinyl roof wrap. Headlights upgraded to STI S204 LED units with Morimoto XB LED bulbs, and taillights replaced with STI S204 clear-lens LED units. Side markers converted to sequential LED units (Diode Dynamics).

Interior: STI S204 Alcantara-wrapped Recaro SRD-II seats (carbon fiber backs) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses. Steering wheel replaced with a Nardi Classic 350mm suede wheel (STI S204 logo embroidered) on a NRG quick-release hub. Shift knob upgraded to a Cusco billet aluminum short shifter with a titanium shift stop. Dashboard and door cards wrapped in Alcantara (Subaru Blue stitching), and the rear seats removed for a Cusco bolt-in roll cage (8-point, chromoly steel).
